pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Operations & Program Management is a primary or secondary domain for the Chief of Staff to CDAIO. This knowledge KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (senior specialist).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Operations & Program Management), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.466). External reviewers may question whether this specific knowledge KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Chief of Staff to CDAIO versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: PMI, TOGAF operational frameworks, and CDO survey data (NewVantage Partners) confirm operational program management as a key competency for data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Operations & Program Management appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Chief of Staff to CDAIO.

decision_rationale: Operations & Program Management knowledge KSA is within scope for the Chief of Staff to CDAIO at the senior specialist tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
